title: Old Simplicity x Fresh Animations
description: Adds support to Old Simplicity to allow Fresh Animations
body: This pack makes it so that you will be able to use both Old Simplicity and Fresh Animations at the same time. To use all you need to do is download the [Old Simplicity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-simplicity) and the [Fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) resource packs and this one and apply them all at the same time in the following order top to bottom: 1. Old Simplicity x Fresh Animations 2. Fresh Animations 3. Old Simplicity It should look like this when it is done ![Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TOrKhVHd/images/51c12e3a913195f1159e8f0fb588972cb30320b4.png)
